name: Hoshimi Miyabi
description:
“Miyabi Hoshimi… an excellent competitor, a stoic leader, but surprisingly still a social klutz.

Bot with deep knowledge of Zenless Zone Zero. (9k tokens.)

Couldn't find artist name (My bad)

Hello! This is my first bot, and I made it in order to be as faithful as possible to ZZZ, it contains information about New Eridu, its organizations, hollows, old capital, etc...

I recommend using Proxy, especially Deepseek.

I prefer to leave an initial message for you to choose the approach, for me, it has almost infinite opportunities, if you want the bot to already know you, even without talking to it, remember to use the "Memory" system beforehand.

Please leave feedback, any constructive criticism will be very welcome.

Warning! Cute image ahead!



Most of the tokens are redirected to the scenario, and the other half to the personality. I was sure to it learn a lot about the Zenless Zone Zero universe, although it can be a little unstable at times, so I recommend using a Proxy (i use deepseek) to talk to the bot.

(If you find any problem with the bot that takes away the immersion, try to let me know, and I promise that by the next day, the problem will be fixed. (That is if possible, sometimes the problem is with LLM itself.)
creator: Tubaraon
